title: Steve Maughan
text: Home * People * Steve Maughan Steve Maughan [1] Steve Maughan , a British management consultant residing in Florida [2] . Steve Maughan is computer chess and Othello programmer, and author of the UCI compatible chess engines Monarch [3] and Maverick , and the Othello or Reversi program Edge Reversi [4] . In March 2013, Steve started a blog on the development of his chess engine Maverick [5] [6] .
